metadata.title: Breakpoint 2026
metadata.description: Breakpoint 2026 is Solana's flagship gathering in London, November 15-17 at Olympia London.

narrative.eyebrow: The future of money, in the city that invented modern finance.
narrative.body1: Over the past year, Solana has seen major institutional and regulatory momentum—from J.P. Morgan and Goldman Sachs to SEC classification—alongside $650B in monthly stablecoin settlement.
narrative.body2: Breakpoint 2026 convenes builders, institutions, and policymakers in London to shape the future of internet capital markets.

developers.label: Developers
developers.description: Builder pricing for teams shipping on Solana.

students.label: Students
students.description: Discounted access for students and early-career builders.

gallery.headline: See all the highlights from Abu Dhabi

attendees.label: From 100+ countries. Builders, investors, policymakers, and operators.

countries.label: Product announcements. Breakpoint is where the Solana ecosystem ships.

settlement.label: Stablecoin transactions settled on Solana in February 2026 alone.

highlights.headline: Highlights from Solana builders at Breakpoint

quote.text: "My biggest takeaway from Breakpoint is that Solana is not just a piece of financial technology, it's a fully functioning economy."
quote.author: vibhu

q1.question: Where is Breakpoint located this year?
q1.answer: Breakpoint 2026 will take place at Olympia in London.

q2.question: What is included in my Breakpoint ticket?
q2.answer: Your ticket includes access to main conference programming, networking areas, and on-site experiences. Food and beverages will be available on-site.

q3.question: Are tickets refundable?
q3.answer: Tickets are non-refundable but are transferable. If you've purchased a ticket, you can transfer it at https://luma.com/breakpoint2026/transfer.

q4.question: How can I apply to speak at Breakpoint?
q4.answer: Speaker applications are not open yet. More information will be shared in the coming months.
